content.situation: 客户第一次到访公司，接待人员在前台热情迎接并表达欢迎
content.speakerText: Welcome to our company! We're so glad you could make it.
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到我们公司！很高兴您能来。
content.hint: 回应欢迎时，常用表达是感谢对方的热情接待

content.situation: 客户刚下车，接待人员上前握手并初次见面打招呼
content.speakerText: Hi, I'm Alex from the marketing team. You must be the new client from the partner firm?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是市场部的Alex。您一定是来自合作公司的新客户吧？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, that's right! It's a pleasure ___
content.hint: 初次见面表示荣幸的标准表达是 'It's a pleasure to meet you'
content.knowledgePoint: 初次见面的礼貌回应结构

content.situation: 客户走进办公室，接待人员微笑迎接并主动表达期待
content.speakerText: We've been looking forward to your visit today!
content.speakerTextCn: 我们一直期待着您今天的到访！
content.responseTemplate: That means a lot to me. I'm excited to ___
content.hint: 回应期待时，应表达对合作或互动的积极态度
content.knowledgePoint: 表达合作意愿的常用短语
